intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding the current state of the biome. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare. P2 (Mexican Mint) is absent/bare. P3 (Pothos) is present but severely diminished. P4 (Silver Guest) is absent/bare.

plant_audit.P1: Empty yellow pot; no visible botanical life.
plant_audit.P2: Empty black pot; no visible botanical life.
plant_audit.P3: Single, etiolated stem with one leaf remaining. White rabbit anchor present.
plant_audit.P4: Empty black pot; no visible botanical life.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, moist, potentially saturated. No fungal blooms, but high debris content.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Presence of a multi-pin connector/component (T-5 to T-3) and a metallic rod/tool (T-1 to Current).

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-3: Stable, minimal change. Component on desk remains.
temporal_deltas.T-2: Significant lighting drop/shadowing; potential camera adjustment.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_Current: Introduction of a metallic rod/tool on the right side of the frame. Plant P3 remains in a state of terminal decline.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of critical failure. P3 is the only surviving specimen, exhibiting signs of severe light deprivation and potential root rot due to the dark, damp soil appearance. The absence of P1, P2, and P4 suggests a total loss of the initial collection.
anomalies: Electronic component (multi-pin) present in early frames.
Metallic rod/tool introduced in final frames.
Eggshell fragments present in P3 pot (likely a soil amendment attempt).
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome has undergone a catastrophic decline. The registry's expected diversity has been reduced to a single, struggling Pothos stem. The soil environment appears overly damp, and the presence of non-botanical items (electronic components and metal tools) suggests an experimental or neglected environment rather than a standard horticultural setup.
